reforms.description: The Federal Government announced a 'Joint initiative for jobs, growth and stability' aimed at stimulating private investment, which includes an investment bonus of 10 percent for companies that increase their investments and measures to provide lower interest loans to small and medium-sized enterprises for capital expenditure on energy conservation and modern technologies.
reforms.package_name: Joint Initiative for Jobs, Growth and Stability
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative is designed to stimulate private investment and support small and medium-sized enterprises, which are crucial for economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme includes measures that have been put into action to facilitate economic adjustment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant structural change aimed at enhancing economic stability and growth.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Government adopted a programme to facilitate the adjustment of the domestic economy to the global economy and to structural change which would cover, inter alia, the following measures: The Kreditanstalt fiir Wiederaufbau was instructed to borrow DM 6.3 billion on international capital markets and to make this sum available at lower interest rates preferably to small and medium-sized enterprises.
